lines.en: (A burning misadventure)
(The allure of a secret tryst)
(Rules melting away)

lines.ja: 清純を装ってる 泥棒猫の罠は誘い
lines.en: Playing innocent — the cat burglar's trap is an invitation

lines.ja: (Bam bam we're damned, Ba-bam bam we're slammed)
lines.en: (Bam bam — we're damned. Ba-bam bam — we're slammed.)

lines.ja: だれも×付けないなら 「正解」と同じでしょ
lines.en: If nobody marks it wrong, that's basically the "right answer," right?

lines.ja: (Bam bam we're damned, Ba-bam bam we're slammed)
lines.en: (Bam bam — we're damned. Ba-bam bam — we're slammed.)
A sweet, sweet, predatory kind of love

lines.ja: そんな「駆け引き」なんてできっこない
lines.en: I couldn't play that "pull-back-and-pounce" game if I tried

lines.ja: 私 欲求のまま狩るだけだから
lines.en: I just hunt — exactly as my desire tells me to

lines.ja: 二人しか知らないこのロマンス
lines.en: This romance only the two of us know

lines.ja: 罪な味で濡らすこのパラダイス
lines.en: this paradise, wet with the flavor of sin —

lines.ja: 麻痺する前に もう点火して
lines.en: before we go numb — light the fuse already
Ask for it —
this dangerous little game of playing with fire

lines.ja: 甘えて 悶えて 肌に牙を剥いて Woah
lines.en: Cling to me, writhe for me, bare your teeth against my skin — woah

lines.ja: 今宵限りのファンタジア
lines.en: Tonight's one-time-only fantasia

lines.ja: 待ってないで さあ踊って
lines.en: Don't wait — come on, dance

lines.ja: その指焦がしてる Dissatisfaction
lines.en: That finger of yours is scorched with Dissatisfaction
After that, just let it happen (yeah)
tumble right on down (yeah)
straight to the bottom of hell (yeah)
Down low, low, low, oh
Even the weight of sin (yeah)
I'll swallow in one gulp (yeah)

lines.ja: こぼれてる 吐息が
lines.en: A breath spilling out,
a thrill that won't stop —
Doesn't matter if it belongs to someone else

lines.ja: ただ 掠め盗るだけ
lines.en: I'm just going to snatch it away
(3, 2, 1 — bass drop)
(A burning misadventure)
(A secret tryst — fragrant allure)
(Rules melting away)

lines.ja: いたずら、ままごと そんな言葉じゃずっとぬるい
lines.en: "Mischief," "playing house" — words like those stay lukewarm forever

lines.ja: (Bam bam we're damned, Ba-bam bam we're slammed)
lines.en: (Bam bam — we're damned. Ba-bam bam — we're slammed.)

lines.ja: 一瞬の儚い 夢こそグサって残るでしょ
lines.en: A fleeting, momentary dream is exactly what sticks like a blade, right?

lines.ja: (Bam bam we're damned, Ba-bam bam we're slammed)
lines.en: (Bam bam — we're damned. Ba-bam bam — we're slammed.)

lines.ja: あなたとわたしで何がしたい？
lines.en: You and me — what do you want to do?

lines.ja: どんな「計算」だってあてにしない
lines.en: I'm not counting on any kind of "calculation"

lines.ja: 熱と嘘で答え かき消えるから
lines.en: because heat and lies will wash any answer clean away

lines.ja: 後ろ手で鍵を掛けてランデヴー
lines.en: Lock the door behind your back — rendezvous

lines.ja: 優しく獲物を狙ってほくそ笑む
lines.en: Gently stalking my prey, grinning to myself

lines.ja: 齧り付いたなら もう点火して
lines.en: Once you bite down — light the fuse already
Show me —
this ugly little game of playing with fire

lines.ja: モラルも 理性も 置き去りの獣に Woah
lines.en: Morals, reason, left behind — turned into a beast — woah
A passionate hypnosis

lines.ja: 絡め取って 楽にして
lines.en: Tangle me up, make it easy

lines.ja: 此処から先は全て Infraction
lines.en: From this point on, it's all Infraction
Words of love? (yeah)
I don't need them anymore (yeah)
A rock-bottom honeymoon (yeah)
Down low, low, low, oh
Selfishness twisted way too far (yeah)
A heart tricking and being tricked (yeah)
There's no return from a mistake like this
A color that stains you into a captive
If we can't go back now,

lines.ja: ただ 爛れ切るだけ
lines.en: then we'll just rot ourselves all the way through

lines.ja: さあ塞いで ウイスキーの香りの口吻で
lines.en: Come on, seal my mouth with yours — whiskey-scented kiss
Tonight it's hunter and prey

lines.ja: 仕留めて 火を付けて
lines.en: Finish the kill — strike the match
Condemn me —
this ridiculous game of playing with fire

lines.ja: 孤独が 鼓動が ここじゃ止めらんないじゃん Woah
lines.en: Loneliness, heartbeat — you can't stop either of them here — woah

lines.ja: 背徳感のトラジェディ
lines.en: A tragedy of forbidden thrill

lines.ja: 誰かさんとの 約束ごと
lines.en: Someone else's promise —
I'm just going to steal it away
Ask for it —
this dangerous little game of playing with fire

lines.en: Cling to me, writhe for me, bare your teeth against my skin — woah
